name: UBA : First Privilege Escalation
notes: Indicates when a user executes privileged access for the first time. This reporting rule can be disabled to allow the tracking of user behaviors for baselining purposes.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following UBA : Privileged User, First Time Privilege Use (logic)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : First Privilege Escalation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following UBA : Privileged User, First Time Privilege Use (logic)
RED_list: Event name: UBA : First Privilege Escalation
Event description: senseValue=10,senseDesc='The user executes privileged access for the first time',usecase_id='94b5576c-9bf8-4ccc-9eae-cf2c87bd422b'
